title: Document serialize_within_feature_tree in CLAUDE.md and multi-backend-agents.md
description: Add a one-paragraph note to the `## Configuration` section of `CLAUDE.md` describing `scheduler.serialize_within_feature_tree`, when to enable it (Swift/Xcode/SPM and similar toolchain-locked stacks), and the trade-off (loses within-worktree packing). Add the field to the `SchedulerConfig` reference table in `docs/multi-backend-agents.md`.
acceptance_criteria: `CLAUDE.md` Configuration section contains a paragraph describing `scheduler.serialize_within_feature_tree`, its default (`false`), and when to enable it
`docs/multi-backend-agents.md` SchedulerConfig table includes a row for `serialize_within_feature_tree` with type, default, and description
No other content in either file is changed
